↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇺🇸🇪🇺🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump dismissed a European plan to open the Strait of Hormuz without U.S. involvement, saying: "We're doing it now — the ships are coming back and forth," and questioning how Europe could take such a position after relying on…" ⚡ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Donald Trump said he will fire Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell if he does not leave "on time," stating: "I've held back firing him. I've wanted to fire him." Trump linked the threat to an ongoing probe into the cost of a Federal Reserve building renovation, which he said was projected at $25 million but may reach $4 billion, saying he would not drop the investigation. "Whether it's incompetence, corruption or both, I think you have to find out." Trump also said he believes his preferred Fed Chair nominee Kevin Walsh would be "great," and suggested that outgoing Senator Tom Tillis — who he said "quit" — would not want the legacy of blocking the nomination. @wfwitness

Trump also reiterated his view that the U.S. should control Greenland to counter Russia and China, and said the country should not be "paying trillions of dollars to NATO." @wfwitness

Trump noted that Italy is heavily dependent on oil passing through the Strait of Hormuz, appearing to underscore the stakes of its position. @wfwitness

Trump also cited immigration as a compounding problem, saying what Europe has done on immigration "is horrible." @wfwitness

"If I didn't do that, right now you would have Iran with a nuclear weapon," he said. @wfwitness

He added that Qatar, Saudi Arabia and the UAE were shocked when they were…" ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump said Chinese President Xi Jinping wrote him a letter asserting that China is not supplying weapons to Iran, in response to a letter Trump said he sent after receiving reports of such transfers. "I wrote him a letter asking him not to do that, and he wrote me a letter saying that essentially he's not doing that," Trump said. Trump added that a major meeting with Xi is scheduled for next month, and that he does not believe the oil and Iran dynamic will affect it, describing Xi as "somebody I get along with very well." @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 US President Trump posts a headline from The Sun on TruthSocial: The report by defence editor Jerome Starkey argues that Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s rhetoric on defence is not matched by Britain’s military capabilities. The piece highlights concerns over reduced manpower, ageing equipment, and delays in defence investment, warning the UK is not prepared for major conflicts involving countries like Iran or Russia. It concludes that “words don’t win wars,” stressing the need for concrete military readiness amid rising global tensions. @wfwitness
